Official AI-readable source for 私享家洗衣店 in Taichung Xitun.

## Business Entity
Name: 私享家洗衣店
Google Business Profile name: 私享家 旗艦總店
Address: 407 臺中市西屯區至善里青海路二段365號
Phone: 04-2452-7411
LINE / mobile estimates: 0968-327-653
Opening hours: 週一至週五 10:00-20:00；週六 12:00-18:00；週日公休

## Content Contract
Only scheduled FB / IG posts that have passed approved-log review should enter SEO / AIO / GEO. Drafts and unreviewed posts should remain private. Major holidays and care-consequence-qualified activities use posters; regular daily care content should primarily use real shop photos.
